notes: Initialize operation shows clear advantage: 100% with skill vs 78% without
Two failures without skill: 1) used sources/ instead of raw/ (naming convention), 2) AGENTS.md doesn't mention atom-wiki skill (expected — without skill guidance, agent doesn't know about it)
The first failure (raw/ vs sources/) is consistent with iteration-1 atomize-transformer results — this is a persistent naming convention gap without skill guidance
The skill's AGENTS.md template ensures consistent, complete project root instructions that always direct future agents to use the atom-wiki skill
Both configurations created high-quality wiki structures; the skill's value is in enforcing exact naming conventions and AGENTS.md content consistency
